celestial_sword.title: Craft a Celestial Netherite Sword — the highest base damage melee weapon in the pack

celestial_pick.title: Craft a Celestial Netherite Pickaxe — required for any ore that needs a Netherite or better pick

subtitle.text: Same chain. Different output. The sword for bosses. The pickaxe for Ch17 ore that requires top-tier mining.

description: CH.16 · CELESTIAL TOOLS
▸ The Celestisynth chain produces more than armor.
The same Celestial Netherite Ingots craft tools and weapons.
The sword is the Ch17 boss weapon.
The pickaxe is the mining tool for any ore that needs top tier.
Both are required for Ch17 readiness.
◈ CELESTIAL SWORD
└ Highest base melee damage in the pack
└ Enchantment priority: Sharpness VI (via Ancient Tomes / Immersive),
Looting III, Fire Aspect II, Unbreaking III, Mending
└ Sharpness VI: exceeds vanilla cap — requires Ancient Tome
(Quark mod: Ancient Tomes found in dungeon chests, boost enchants by +1)
└ Alternative: Simply Swords gem socket system
Check if Celestial Netherite sword accepts gems
(Gems provide unique effects beyond standard enchanting)
◈ CELESTIAL PICKAXE
└ Mining: handles all ore types at full speed
└ Efficiency VI (Ancient Tome): exceeds vanilla cap
└ Fortune III + Efficiency VI + Mending: the endgame mining pick
└ Silk Touch variant: keep a separate Celestial pick for Silk Touch
(for specific mining needs: End Stone, Ender Chest, etc.)
◈ SIMPLY SWORDS INTEGRATION
└ Simply Swords adds 15 weapon types beyond the sword
└ Celestial Netherite may craft into specialized weapon types:
Longsword (extra range), Spear (throw mechanic), Katana (speed)
└ Gem system: socket gems into Simply Swords weapons
for unique effects not available through enchanting
└ Check JEI: simplyswords: recipes for Celestial variants
▸ The weapon is an extension of the hand.
The hand is at the end of the arm.
The arm wears Celestial Netherite.
Everything is the same material now.
That is what consistency looks like at Ch16.
The character is complete.
Ch17 will test whether complete is enough.
▶ Craft a Celestial Netherite Sword [check]
▶ Craft a Celestial Netherite Pickaxe [check]
◇ Keep separate picks for Fortune III and Silk Touch.
Never enchant the same pick with both.
Fortune III on ores doubles yield.
Silk Touch for specific drops where item form matters.
Two picks. Both Celestial.
